channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SpaceX Plans IPO with Potential $2-Trillion Valuation, Could Become Largest Ever
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is reportedly aiming for a valuation exceeding $2 trillion in its upcoming initial public offering (IPO), according to Bloomberg News. The private aerospace company has been discuss...

item.title: Adelabu’s Failures and Nigeria’s Persistent Electricity Crisis
item.description: For many areas for Nigeria, the heavy rains this week bring small relief from the hot weather, but electricity wahala still dey for everywhere. Daytime temperatures during March reach between 33°C for...

item.title: Pakistan engages IMF and World Bank on economic challenges caused by Middle East conflict
item.description: Pakistan’s Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb is scheduled to visit Washington from April 11 to 17, 2026, for the IMF and World Bank Spring Meetings. This visit has become especially significant due ...

item.title: North Melbourne prepares to face Carlton in Good Friday AFL clash
item.description: North Melbourne is gearing up for their Good Friday AFL clash against Carlton at Marvel Stadium, seeking to improve their disappointing record in the marquee fixture. Carlton has struggled in the seco...

item.title: Operation Sindoor: Indian Air Force Counters Large-Scale Drone Attacks from Pakistan
item.description: On May 7–9, 2025, India faced unprecedented aerial challenges during Operation Sindoor as Pakistan launched large-scale drone attacks along the LoC and international borders. These attacks involved hu...

item.title: U.S. Report Highlights Corruption and Lack of Transparency in Kenya's Public Procurement
item.description: A recent 2026 report by the United States Government has raised serious concerns about corruption and opacity in Kenya's public procurement system. According to the National Trade Estimate (NTE) repor...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II crew departs Earth orbit on lunar test mission
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has successfully fired its engines and departed Earth orbit, setting course for a lunar flyby. The crew, comprising three Americans and one Canadian, spent the first day test...

item.title: The Role of Sport in Shaping Society and Public Life
item.description: Sport is more than just competition; it acts as a mirror of society, reflecting public moods and tensions. Matches, derbies, and national team campaigns create a shared experience that can unite stran...

item.title: Karnataka Plans Revival of Student Union Elections After 37-Year Ban
item.description: For nearly 37 years, student union elections have been banned across colleges and universities in Karnataka, silencing what was once a vibrant hub of campus politics. The ban, imposed in 1989 by the C...

item.title: Artemis II begins historic lunar mission with successful engine burn
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has embarked on a historic journey to the Moon, marking the first crewed lunar mission since 1972. The spacecraft, carrying astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina ...

item.title: NSW councils urge pause on AI data centre approvals over power and water concerns
item.description: Local councils in New South Wales are urging a temporary halt on the construction of AI data centres due to the strain they place on essential services such as electricity and water, which are affecti...

item.title: President Mwinyi Urges Unity, Peace, and Patriotism During Uhuru Torch Launch in Pemba
item.description: PEMBA – The President of Zanzibar, Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi, has called upon all Tanzanians to safeguard and strengthen the Union of Tanzania, emphasizing peace, stability, and national unity as pillars ...

item.title: US Judge Dismisses Most of Blake Lively's Sexual Harassment Claims Against Justin Baldoni
item.description: A U.S. federal judge has dismissed the majority of Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims in her lawsuit against Justin Baldoni, related to their work on the 2024 romantic drama 'It Ends With Us.' Di...

item.title: Government Ends Blanket Fuel Subsidy, Announces Targeted Support Amid Global Oil Shock
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The federal government on Thursday announced a major hike in fuel prices amid global oil price shocks influenced by the US-Israel conflict with Iran. Petrol prices have been raised by Rs137...

item.title: Blue Owl imposes withdrawal limits on major private credit funds following high investor demand
item.description: Blue Owl Capital has announced that it will impose restrictions on redemptions from two of its private credit funds due to an unusual surge in withdrawal requests. The firm's $36 billion Blue Owl Cred...

item.title: Medical Examiner Rules Death of Rohingya Refugee After CBP Release as Homicide
item.description: Nurul Amin Shah Alam, a nearly blind Rohingya refugee who did not speak English, was found dead in February in New York days after being released by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP). The Erie ...

item.title: Father requests his son, among Maharashtra's remaining Maoists, to return home
item.description: The news article focuses on the emotional plea made by a father to his son, who is among the few remaining Maoist rebels in Maharashtra. The father appeals for his son to return home and leave behind ...

item.title: Full List of AMVCA 2026 Nominees Shows ‘Gingerrr’ and ‘The Herd’ Leading
item.description: Di Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) don announce di nominees for di 12th edition wey go happen on May 9, 2026, for Lagos. Dis year, di films ‘Gingerrr’ and ‘The Herd’ dey lead di nomination...

item.title: Experienced Midfielder Sure Boy Requests to Leave Yanga Amid Reduced Playing Time
item.description: After three strong seasons with Young Africans (Yanga), defensive midfielder Salum 'Sure Boy' Abubakar has decided to request a move away from the club at the end of the current season. Sure Boy joine...

item.title: Mulamwah reconnects with daughter Keilah after school term
item.description: Kenyan comedian David Oyando, widely known as Mulamwah, recently shared heartwarming moments with his daughter Keilah Oyando after picking her up from school at the end of the first quarter. Social me...
